title: Habits agent builder vs WKAppBot: declarative vs execution-layer
desc: Habits is open-source declarative agent-loop runtime (cron+LLM+tool-call YAML). WKAppBot Eye+skills+YAML scenario already covers this pattern. WKAppBot's a11y/Win32/CDP execution layer is the moat Habits lacks.
steps: Habits: declarative agent loops -- define triggers, conditions, and actions as habits that fire on schedule or event. YAML-based, LLM reasoning, tool-call execution.
WKAppBot Eye acts as persistent event-driven daemon (FSW + Slack + watchdog). Skills = structured step chains. YAML scenarios = same declarative trigger-action model.
Habits has no Windows a11y, no UIA/Win32/SendInput stack, no CDP browser control -- it runs at LLM orchestration layer only.
Verdict: not-applicable. WKAppBot value is the a11y/Win32/CDP execution layer. Habits pattern is already covered by Eye + skills + scenario. wkappbot suggest runtime, evaluate open-source patterns
author: claude
